'''âzh-w-n''' ('''zhawana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacuum|vacuum]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacuum|vacuum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-w-n
|-
! Lemma
| zhawana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhawanithi|zhawanithi]] || [[word:zhawaniji|zhawaniji]] || [[word:zhawanishi|zhawanishi]] || [[word:zhawani|zhawani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhawanuthuth|zhawanuthuth]] || [[word:zhawanujuj|zhawanujuj]] || [[word:zhawanushush|zhawanushush]] || [[word:zhawan|zhawan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhawanuthu|zhawanuthu]] || [[word:zhawanuju|zhawanuju]] || [[word:zhawanushu|zhawanushu]] || [[word:zhawanu|zhawanu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhawanufuth|zhawanufuth]] || [[word:zhawanufuj|zhawanufuj]] || [[word:zhawanufush|zhawanufush]] || [[word:zhawanuf|zhawanuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhawanethe|zhawanethe]] || [[word:zhawaneje|zhawaneje]] || [[word:zhawaneshe|zhawaneshe]] || [[word:zhawane|zhawane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhawanothoth|zhawanothoth]] || [[word:zhawanojoj|zhawanojoj]] || [[word:zhawanoshosh|zhawanoshosh]] || [[word:zhawan|zhawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhawanotho|zhawanotho]] || [[word:zhawanojo|zhawanojo]] || [[word:zhawanosho|zhawanosho]] || [[word:zhawano|zhawano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhawanofoth|zhawanofoth]] || [[word:zhawanofoj|zhawanofoj]] || [[word:zhawanofosh|zhawanofosh]] || [[word:zhawanof|zhawanof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhawanĂŠthĂŠ|zhawanĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhawanĂŠjĂŠ|zhawanĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhawanĂŠshĂŠ|zhawanĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhawanĂŠ|zhawanĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhawanathath|zhawanathath]] || [[word:zhawanajaj|zhawanajaj]] || [[word:zhawanashash|zhawanashash]] || [[word:zhawan|zhawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhawanatha|zhawanatha]] || [[word:zhawanaja|zhawanaja]] || [[word:zhawanasha|zhawanasha]] || [[word:zhawana|zhawana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhawanafath|zhawanafath]] || [[word:zhawanafaj|zhawanafaj]] || [[word:zhawanafash|zhawanafash]] || [[word:zhawanaf|zhawanaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhawanasha|zhawanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhawanasha|gozhawanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhawanasha|gokizhawanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhawanĂŒsha|zhawanĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhawanknĂŒsha|gozhawanknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhawanĂŒsha|gokizhawanĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhawanshĂ«sha|zhawanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhawankshĂ«sha|gozhawankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhawanshĂ«sha|gokizhawanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhawanrosha|zhawanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhawankrosha|gozhawankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhawanrosha|gokizhawanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhawanmusha|zhawanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhawankmusha|gozhawankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhawanmusha|gokizhawanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhawansherasha|zhawansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhawanksherasha|gozhawanksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhawansherasha|gokizhawansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhawangasha|zhawangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhawankngasha|gozhawankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhawangasha|gokizhawangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhawanyasha|zhawanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhawankyasha|gozhawankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhawanyasha|gokizhawanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhawanyamasha|zhawanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhawankyamasha|gozhawankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhawanyamasha|gokizhawanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhawanĂŒshĂ«sha|zhawanĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhawanknĂŒshĂ«sha|gozhawanknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhawanĂŒshĂ«sha|gokizhawanĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhawanĂŒrosha|zhawanĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhawanknĂŒrosha|gozhawanknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhawanĂŒrosha|gokizhawanĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhawanĂŒmusha|zhawanĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhawanknĂŒmusha|gozhawanknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhawanĂŒmusha|gokizhawanĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhawanshĂ«nĂŒsha|zhawanshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhawankshĂ«nĂŒsha|gozhawankshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhawanshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokizhawanshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhawanshĂ«rosha|zhawanshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhawankshĂ«rosha|gozhawankshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhawanshĂ«rosha|gokizhawanshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhawanshĂ«musha|zhawanshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhawankshĂ«musha|gozhawankshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhawanshĂ«musha|gokizhawanshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhawanronĂŒsha|zhawanronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhawankronĂŒsha|gozhawankronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhawanronĂŒsha|gokizhawanronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhawanroshĂ«sha|zhawanroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhawankroshĂ«sha|gozhawankroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhawanroshĂ«sha|gokizhawanroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhawanromusha|zhawanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhawankromusha|gozhawankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhawanromusha|gokizhawanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhawanmunĂŒsha|zhawanmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhawankmunĂŒsha|gozhawankmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhawanmunĂŒsha|gokizhawanmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhawanmushĂ«sha|zhawanmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhawankmushĂ«sha|gozhawankmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhawanmushĂ«sha|gokizhawanmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhawanmurosha|zhawanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhawankmurosha|gozhawankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhawanmurosha|gokizhawanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhawan|zhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zhĂŠwĂŠn|zhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhawan|hozhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozhĂŠwĂŠn|hozhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhawan|hohozhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhĂŠwĂŠn|hohozhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒzhawan|nĂŒzhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒzhĂŠwĂŠn|nĂŒzhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzhawan|nĂŒnĂŒzhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzhĂŠwĂŠn|nĂŒnĂŒzhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻzhawan|nĂŻzhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻzhĂŠwĂŠn|nĂŻzhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzhawan|nĂŻnĂŻzhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzhĂŠwĂŠn|nĂŻnĂŻzhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhawan|luzhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzhĂŠwĂŠn|luzhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhawan|luluzhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhĂŠwĂŠn|luluzhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhawan|lizhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizhĂŠwĂŠn|lizhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhawan|lilizhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhĂŠwĂŠn|lilizhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhawan|kozhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozhĂŠwĂŠn|kozhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhawan|kokozhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhĂŠwĂŠn|kokozhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhawan|kezhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezhĂŠwĂŠn|kezhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhawan|kekezhawan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhĂŠwĂŠn|kekezhĂŠwĂŠn]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
